stemHtml: Which of the following is correct about hyperventilation? Hyperventilation is breathing:

options.a: In more oxygen than the body requires and in doing so the body removes less CO2 than it produces.
options.b: In excess of metabolic needs and in doing so the body removes more CO<sub>2</sub> than it produces.
options.c: With a too low rate of breathing, so the concentration of CO<sub>2</sub> in the blood remains too high.
options.d: With a too high rate of breathing, which causes an excess of oxygen in the blood.
